br_position_name: Sioux Falls City Council - Southeast District
reason: Sioux Falls Council districts are directional (NE/NW/SE/SW/Central); L2 represents them as City_Ward 1-5. Verified by point-in-polygon: 97.2% of Ward 2 voters fall inside the Southeast District polygon from Sioux Falls GIS. LLM had returned NOT_MATCHED.

br_position_name: Los Angeles County Superior Court Judge - Office 14
reason: Position added to BallotReady after the llm_l2_br_match_20260126 snapshot, so it was never scored and had no district. CA superior court judges are elected within their county (single county), per CA Constitution Art. VI Sec. 16(b) (https://law.justia.com/constitution/california/article-vi/section-16/); sibling LA Superior Court seats all match to County / LOS ANGELES (DATA-1958)
